config.enabled.name: Enabled
config.enabled.tooltip: Whether animals follow you home after purchase. When disabled, animals teleport to the barn as normal.
config.follow_speed.name: Follow Speed
config.follow_speed.tooltip: Speed multiplier for how fast animals catch up when they fall behind. Higher values make them keep up better.
config.rubber_band_distance.name: Catch-up Distance
config.rubber_band_distance.tooltip: If the animal falls this many tiles behind, it teleports closer to you.
config.auto_deliver_time.name: Auto-deliver Time
config.auto_deliver_time.tooltip: Game time when animals are automatically sent home if you haven't delivered them yet. (2000 = 8:00 PM)
config.animal_sounds.name: Animal Sounds
config.animal_sounds.tooltip: Whether following animals make sounds while walking with you.
config.sound_interval.name: Sound Interval (Seconds)
config.sound_interval.tooltip: How many seconds between animal sounds while following.
config.show_notifications.name: Show Notifications
config.show_notifications.tooltip: Show HUD messages when animals start following and when they arrive home.
config.npc_reactions.name: NPC Reactions
config.npc_reactions.tooltip: Nearby villagers will react with speech bubbles when they see you escorting animals.
config.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
config.debug_logging.tooltip: Log detailed debug messages to the SMAPI console. Useful for troubleshooting.
hud.auto_delivered: {{name}} got tired of waiting and found their own way home.
hud.waiting_at_door: {{name}} is waiting at the {{building}}. Open the animal door to let them in!
npc.reaction.single.0: Aww, look at you walking {{name}} home!
npc.reaction.single.2: What a cutie! Welcome to the valley, little one.
npc.reaction.single.3: Taking the scenic route home, I see!
npc.reaction.single.4: Well aren't you the responsible farmer.
npc.reaction.single.5: Hey there! New addition to the farm?
npc.reaction.single.6: That {{type}} seems to like you already.
npc.reaction.single.7: Careful on the path, you two!
npc.reaction.single.9: I love seeing new animals around here.
npc.reaction.single.10: Look at you two! That's really sweet.
npc.reaction.single.11: Hey {{name}}! You picked a good human to live with.
npc.reaction.single.12: Walking your new {{type}} home? That's dedication.
npc.reaction.single.13: A new {{type}}! The farm's going to be even livelier now.
npc.reaction.single.15: {{name}} just gave me a look... should I be worried?
npc.reaction.single.16: I tried walking a chicken on a leash once. Did not go well.
npc.reaction.single.17: What's that smell? Oh! I think {{name}} had a little accident there...
npc.reaction.single.19: You remind me of my grandpa. He used to walk his animals everywhere.
npc.reaction.single.20: Ha, is {{name}} keeping up okay? Looks a little tired.
npc.reaction.single.21: I hope that {{type}} doesn't chew on my garden...
npc.reaction.single.22: That's a healthy looking {{type}}. Good eye.
npc.reaction.single.23: Oh great, now my shoes smell like barn.
npc.reaction.single.24: {{name}} just left a little present on the road. You're cleaning that up, right?
npc.reaction.single.25: Wait, is that a {{type}} on the sidewalk? That's a first.
npc.reaction.single.26: Don't let {{name}} near Pierre's display. He'd have a fit.
npc.reaction.single.27: Aw, {{name}} is trying so hard to keep up!
npc.reaction.single.28: That {{type}} looks like it has more personality than half the town.
npc.reaction.single.29: Hope you've got plenty of hay stocked up back at the farm.
npc.reaction.single.30: Is... is {{name}} looking at me? I think it's looking at me.
npc.reaction.single.31: Okay, that's cute. I'm not going to pretend it's not.
npc.reaction.single.32: My cat would NOT be okay with this.
npc.reaction.single.33: You and {{name}} make a pretty good team.
npc.reaction.single.34: I wonder if {{name}} knows where you're taking them.
npc.reaction.multi.0: You've got yourself a whole parade there!
npc.reaction.multi.1: That's quite the group! {{count}} new friends?
npc.reaction.multi.2: Look at them all following you... like little ducklings!
npc.reaction.multi.3: Somebody's been busy at the market today!
npc.reaction.multi.4: Better not lose any on the way back!
npc.reaction.multi.5: Ha! You look like the pied piper out here.
npc.reaction.multi.6: That's a lot of new friends! The farm must be growing.
npc.reaction.multi.7: All those animals following you... what a sight.
npc.reaction.multi.8: Starting a whole farm today, huh?
npc.reaction.multi.9: They're all so well-behaved. I'm impressed!
npc.reaction.multi.10: Ugh, one of them just went number two on the path. Who's cleaning that up?
npc.reaction.multi.11: That's... a lot of animals in the middle of town.
npc.reaction.multi.12: I can smell the farm from here. No offense.
npc.reaction.multi.13: Are they all yours? You must have your hands full!
npc.reaction.multi.14: The town square is turning into a barnyard!
npc.reaction.multi.15: How do you even get them to walk in a line like that?
npc.reaction.multi.16: I think one of them is staring at me.
npc.reaction.multi.17: This is the most exciting thing I've seen in town all week.
npc.reaction.multi.18: My yard better not end up as a pit stop for that bunch.
npc.reaction.multi.19: You're not bringing those through the saloon, are you?
